# Sprint 4.1 Rbac Design

**Sprint:** Sprint 4. Governance Security And Compliance
**Objective:** Implement governance, security, and compliance controls to ensure data protection and regulatory adherence.

## Description
Design and implement the role-based access control (RBAC) model, including least-privilege access and column-level masking.

## Deliverable
RBAC design and implementation
